description: pdfmux-bench corpus manifest. Only public-domain / openly-licensed documents. PDFs are fetched from these canonical URLs at run time (never committed); ground-truth <id>.gt.md files are committed. Records with needs_pin=true name a real source collection but leave the exact document URL + sha256 for a contributor to finalize.

documents.title: IRS Form 1040 — U.S. Individual Income Tax Return
documents.notes: Federal tax form: dense key-value fields, checkboxes, dollar-amount columns. Classic forms failure mode.

documents.title: IRS Form W-9 — Request for Taxpayer Identification Number
documents.notes: Single-page form with checkboxes and boxed fields.

documents.title: IRS Form W-4 — Employee's Withholding Certificate
documents.notes: Form with a worksheet table and multiple checkbox groups.

documents.title: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al., 2017)
documents.notes: Two-column academic layout with equations and tables. Reading order across columns is the key stressor.

documents.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers (Devlin et al., 2018)
documents.notes: Two-column with multiple result tables — good complex-table + academic overlap.

documents.title: Training language models to follow instructions (Ouyang et al., 2022)
documents.notes: Large multi-section tables with spanning headers.

documents.title: SEC 10-K annual report (financial statement tables)
documents.notes: Pin a specific 10-K exhibit PDF via EDGAR (e.g. CIK browse -> Archives/edgar/data/<cik>/<accession>/...). Dense balance-sheet and cash-flow tables. Filings are public record.

documents.title: Historic US newspaper page (public-domain, degraded scan)
documents.notes: Pin a pre-1929 newspaper page PDF from chroniclingamerica.loc.gov. Low-DPI, skew, dense multi-column newsprint, bleed-through. Public domain by age.

documents.title: Public-domain handwritten manuscript page
documents.source: Library of Congress — Manuscript Division / National Archives (catalog.archives.gov)
documents.notes: Pin a public-domain handwritten historical document (e.g. a 19th-century letter). Cursive OCR stressor.

documents.title: Arabic Wikipedia article (PDF export) — RTL / bidi
documents.notes: Deterministic REST PDF endpoint for the article 'الجزائر' (Algeria). RTL reading order + bidi digits. Verify the rest_v1 pdf endpoint is enabled at fetch time; if not, pin a mirror. Attribution required (CC-BY-SA).

documents.title: Project Gutenberg public-domain book (digital-native baseline)
documents.notes: Pin a Gutenberg PDF edition (clean text layer) as the digital-native control. Everyone should score high here; it isolates OCR-independent quality.
